member.name: T:IDEA.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:IDEA.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:IDEA.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.Dataset2DDL
member.summary: Transform the dataset content to DDL commands

member.name: P:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.Dataset2DDL.SQL
member.summary: Get the constructed SQL statement

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.Dataset2DDL.Dataset2SQL(System.Data.DataSet,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Routine to execute the transformation f'rom a datatable to DDL sql statements
member.param: create ddle for the foreign keys

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.Dataset2DDL.DataRelation2SQL(System.Data.DataRelation)
member.summary: Transform a relation element in the datatable to an alter table statement in ddl

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.Dataset2DDL.DataTable2SQL(System.Data.DataTable,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Transform a datatable to a ddl sql statement
member.returns: True or false for the processing of this function

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.Dataset2DDL.DataColumn(System.Data.DataColumn,System.Data.DataColumn[])
member.summary: Process a datacolumn in a datatable to a part of a DDL sql statement
member.param: Process the collection of primary keys

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.Dataset2DDL.DataType2SQL(System.Data.DataColumn)
member.summary: Process the datatype in the datatable to a relevant SQL server datatype

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository
member.summary: Helper class for transforming output from the Sparx API in a more usable format within a DotNet (windows) application.

member.name: F:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository._Package_id
member.summary: Bewaar de package property voor het aanmaken van elementen in dit package

member.name: P:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.Package_Id
member.summary: Return the stored package id

member.name: P:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.Repository
member.summary: include a reference to the repository as that saves typing

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddElementAndConnector(EA.Element,System.Data.DataRow,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Process a datarow for import to transform to a new element and association in EA
member.param: The name of the field in the datarow
The stereotype of the element to connect to
The stereotype of the column to connect to
Eventually use a postfix (for a context) for the fieldcontent

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddElementAndConnectorValue(EA.Element,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a new object and connector to the repository
member.param: Fieldvalue and postfix is combined to create the name of the linked object
Stereotype of the element that will be created
Stereotype of the connector between the object and the newly created element
Fieldvalue and postfix is combined to create the name of the linked object

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.ProcessMappingDefinitions(System.Data.DataRow,System.Data.DataRow,EA.Element)
member.summary: Process the mapping definitions that are used for the import of the excel sheet to the repository
member.param: Definition of the mapping as a datarow from the definitions dataset
Data items that are transformed in the import routine
Element to create the content to

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddAttribute(EA.Element,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add an attribute to an element

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddOrUpdateTaggedValue(EA.Element,System.String,System.Data.DataRow,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Add (when not exist) or update a tagged value from a datarow
member.param: Name of the field in the datarow

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddOrUpdateTaggedValue(EA.Element,System.String,System.String,System.Data.DataRow,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Add (when not exist) or update a tagged value from a datarow with a different tv name
member.param: Name of the field in the datarow

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.GetTaggedValue(EA.Element,System.String)
member.summary: Get a tagged value content for an element

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddOrUpdateTaggedValue(EA.Element,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Add or update a tagged value to an element
member.param: Is the value a memo value

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.ConvertStereotype2Type(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a stereotype to an objecttype

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.ConvertAssociationStereotype2Type(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a stereotype of a connector to a connectortype

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddElement(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add an element to the repository

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddPackage(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a package to the model based on the name and a memo text Developed for the Dutch Air Traffic Control
member.param: Eventually a memo text an empty string will not add a memo of course

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddUMLElement(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a new UML element instead of an ArchiMate MDG item
member.param: Name of the element hat will be creayed
Object type in the UML notation for the element to create

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.FindPackage(System.String)
member.summary: Find a package by name

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.FindOrAddElement(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Search or add an element by name and stereotype

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.FindOrAddElement(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean@,System.String)
member.summary: Find or add an element including a memo
member.param: Memo with a description of the element

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.FindOrAddPackage(System.String,System.Boolean@,System.String)
member.summary: Find or add a package based on the name use this call when a memo is available

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.FindElement(System.String,System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Search for an element by name and stereotype

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.FindPackage(System.String,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: Find a package by name
member.param: Reference parameter for a found element or not

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.FindElementByTaggedValue(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Search for an element by tagged value (for keys from an external system

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddConnector(EA.Element,EA.Element,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: vAdd a connector to the repository

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DataSet2Repository.AddConnector(EA.Element,EA.Element,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a connector to the reposity with a connector name

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator
member.summary: Class for doing the generic routines of deduplication. This has various routines for deduplicating elements.

member.name: F:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator._Repository
member.summary: Reference to the EArepository

member.name: F:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.strOriginals
member.summary: String concatenation of the various properties of the original

member.name: F:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.strModules
member.summary: String concatenation of the various properties of the duplicate

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.AddModuleViaCheckBox(System.Windows.Forms.CheckBox)
member.summary: Helper routine to bring the values of the checkboxes in the deduplicator screen to the deduplicator functions

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.HasModule(System.String)
member.summary: Method to check for running a deduplication routine

member.name: P:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.Repository
member.summary: Connection to the open and active repostory

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.DeDuplicatePackage(EA.Package,System.String,System.Windows.Forms.ProgressBar,System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Get duplicates based on the selected package

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.DeDuplicateConnectors(EA.Package,System.String,System.Windows.Forms.ProgressBar,System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Deduplicate connectors in the package
member.param: Move the duplicates to a duplicates packages

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.DeduplicateElement(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deduplicate two elements in which you merge a number of child elements from the duplicate to the original
member.param: Duplicate element (to move to the duplicate folder)
Package id for the duplicates to move to

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DeDuplicator.DeduplicateConnector(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Deduplicate a connector, often there are more connectors between two elements because users hide associations and create new ones

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase
member.summary: Communication with a database via oledb

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.IsOleDB
member.summary: Is the sql connection an oledb connection

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.IsMSAccess
member.summary: Is it an access database that is connected this makes some sql statements different like wildcards

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.MakeConnection
member.summary: Make connection to a database

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.SetConnection(System.String)
member.summary: Set the connection string for the database

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.#ctor
member.summary: Instantiate database object

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate the database object with a connectionstring

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.ClearError
member.summary: Opnieuw een statement uitvoeren dus eerst de foutenlog clearen

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.GetErrorMessage
member.summary: Retrieve any stacked error messages

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.SQL2DataTable(System.String,System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Execute a Data Retrieve statement and return it as a datatable

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.ExecuteModify(System.String)
member.summary: execute a Data Manipulation (insert/update/delete) statement

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.OpenConnection(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Open a connection to the database

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.CloseConnection(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Close an open databaseconnection

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.DefaultSql(System.String)
member.summary: Process the sql statement to a standard so that the NULLs are handled correctly

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.ExecuteSupply(System.String)
member.summary: Execute a sql statement and transform to a supplier

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADatabase.ExecuteSupply(System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Execute a sql as a selectstatement and return a data supplier

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer
member.summary: Dataset container for the IDEA simulator

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.GetDataTable(System.String)
member.summary: Get a datatable from the dataset by name
member.param: Name of the datatable to retrieve

member.name: P:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.ContainerDataSet
member.summary: Get the dataset with the simulator elements

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.#ctor(System.String)
member.summary: Instantiate the simulator dataset container

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddTable(System.String)
member.summary: Add an empty datatable to the dataset

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddTable(System.String,System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Add a datatable to the dataset
member.param: Name of the table in the dataset

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.CreateControlTable
member.summary: Create a control table and define the columns Control table is relevant for the simulator user interface

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.DataTable2Command
member.summary: Transform the datatables in the tables collection to sql statments for insert update etc

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.CreateCommandTable
member.summary: Create the structure of the sys_command datatable

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddExtraTable
member.summary: Add extra tables to the dataet for various system settings of the simulator

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddCommand(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a command to the command systemtable

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddRelation(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a relation between the parent and the child object and combine it with a defined lookup

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.Column2ParaMeter(System.Data.DataColumn)
member.summary: Transform a columnname to a default parameter template

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.DataTable2Insert(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Transform a datatable to an insert statement

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.DataTable2Delete(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Transform a datatable to an delete statement

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.DataTable2Update(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Transform a datatable to an update statement

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.DataTable2Detail(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Transform a datatable to an one row select statement

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.DataTable2List(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Transform a datatable to a search select statement

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.Table2Where(System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: create a where statement for a datatable

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.CreateEnumerationTable
member.summary: transform an enumeration to the content of the enumeration system table

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.CreateRelationTable
member.summary: Create a system table for the relations for processing in the simulator and the form factory

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.GetControlsForTable(System.String)
member.summary: create a view with a list of controls for a table

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.GetEnumeration(System.String)
member.summary: Get an enumeration from the enumeration system table

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.GetCommandForTable(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Get a commands from the system table with commands

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.GetDataViewFromTable(System.String)
member.summary: Get an empty dataview for a table

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.LoadDataFromSQL
member.summary: Load the tables from a sql data source

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.LoadDataFromXML
member.summary: Load the datatable content from a XML file

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.SaveDataToXML(System.Data.XmlWriteMode)
member.summary: Save the dataset to a XML file
member.param: Use write options for creating the XML file Default is no schema

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddColumn(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a datacolumn to a datatable in a default format

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddPrimaryKey(System.Data.DataTable,System.String)
member.summary: Add a primary key to the datatable based on a column name

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.LookupToCommand(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Transform a Lookup definitie to a SQL select statement

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddColumn(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Add a column to a datatable with extra parameters for dbnull

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddCalculatedColumn(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a calculated column based on an expression

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddControl(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Add a control to the systemtable with controls

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddConditions(EA.Element,System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Add a constraint collection from the ea element and transform it to a validation calculated field

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddControl(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Add a control to the controls system table

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.Inheritance2DataSet(EA.Element,System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Transform the inheritance structure to a list of datacolumns in the datatable

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.DefaultLookup(EA.Element)
member.summary: When there is no lookup defined create a lookup based on the scope public of the attributes

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.Connectors2DataSet(EA.Element,System.Int64)
member.summary: Create connectors in the dataset from the connectors in EA

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AttributeType2Control(EA.Attribute)
member.summary: Transform the attribute type to a control for code generation

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.Attributes2Dataset(EA.Element,System.Data.DataTable,System.String)
member.summary: Bring the attributes from an element to a datatable (columns)

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetContainer.AddEnumeration(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add an enumation to the system table in a structured format

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetHelper
member.summary: Helper for working with datatables and datasets in import and export routines

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetHelper.#ctor
member.summary: Create a new instance of the helper

member.name: F:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetHelper._DataTable
member.summary: Active datatable in a dataset

member.name: P:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetHelper.DataTable
member.summary: Set or get a datatable

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLADataSetHelper.DataTable2String(System.String)
member.summary: Convert a datatable content to a string based on a template string

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLALoadTree
member.summary: Class for loading a treeview in the explorer windows of the simulator

member.summary: Load a node to the treeview
member.param: Data table with the values and display items
Key for reference to the table content for use in an url
Name to display in the treeview
Rootnode where the elements as child are added to

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLALoadTree.LoadTreeViewChildNodes(System.Data.DataRow[],System.String,System.String,System.Windows.Forms.TreeNode,System.String)
member.summary: Added elements to a treeview based on datarows
member.param: Key value to use for an url to navigate to an element
Name to display in the treeview
Rootnode where the elements as child are added to
Table name for navigation in the url

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLALoadTree.LoadTreeViewNode(System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.String,System.Windows.Forms.TreeNode)
member.param: Data table with the values and display items
Key for reference to the table content for use in an url
Name to display in the treeview
Rootnode where the elements as child are added to

member.summary: Create a treeview element for adding new elements to the database

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLALoadTree.PopulateNew(System.Windows.Forms.TreeNode)
member.summary: Create a treeview element for adding new elements to the database

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLALoadTree.SetFilter(System.String)
member.summary: Set a filter keyword to the treeview for loading a subset

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLASupplier
member.summary: Class for encapsulating navigation through a recordset can be used for example to fill list boxes etc.

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLASupplier.#ctor(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Constructor geeft aan dat een datareader gebruikt wordt ipv een dataset

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLASupplier.SetStatement(System.String,System.Data.Common.DbConnection)
member.summary: Put the sql statement in the form of a dataadapter or datareader with a nice error handling

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator
member.summary: Class for generating source code for the forfactory ASP.Net application. (Specific routines not further documented)

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.ProcessEnumerations(System.Data.DataTable,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Process the enumerations and transform it to rows in the codelist table in the formfactory

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.ProcessListForm(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Create a webform entity in the form factory based on the name First delete all the rows in the table and the child table based on a list name

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.ProcessParentRelation(System.String,System.Data.DataTable,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Process parent relation for an added linked table Unfortunately not yety possible with the relevant lookups

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.ProcessForm(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: First delete all the rows in the table and the child table based on a entity name

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.ProcessMenu(System.String,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Process a menu item in the form factory based on the entity name

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.Lookup2Statement(System.String,System.Data.DataTable)
member.summary: Transform a lookup statement to a SQL statement in the Formfactory tables

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.ProcessControl(System.Data.DataTable,System.Data.DataTable,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Transform attributes in a sql statement used in comboboxes to an sql statement in the form factory tables

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.OpenDataBase
member.summary: Open the database to the form factory database

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.CloseDataBase
member.summary: Close the database to the form factory database

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.Package2SimulatorDataset(EA.Package,System.String)
member.summary: Transform the content of a package in the repo to a dataset that is the metamodel for the simulator

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.ProcessPackage2DataSet(EA.Package,IDEA.SimulatorContainer)
member.summary: Transform the content of a package to the dataset for the simulator

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.FormFactoryGenerator.ProcessPackageRelation2DataSet(EA.Package,IDEA.SimulatorContainer)
member.summary: Process the content of a package in the repository to the relevant relationships for the simulator

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates
member.summary: Dataset for creating templates for the HTML generator in IDEA Templates are filled with a default model but can be modified

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates.#ctor
member.summary: Create the entity and create the internal datastructure for the templates

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates.AddTemplate(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a template to the set of templates
member.param: SQL statement for the retrieval of data from the repository

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates.GetRowByTemplate(System.String)
member.summary: Get row from the template datatable by template name

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates.FindRowByName(System.String)
member.summary: Find a templateelement in the template data structure based on the name
member.returns: Return is true if the element is found in the collection

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates.GetRowByName(System.String)
member.summary: Get the element in the templates based on the name
member.returns: the datarow with the content of the template

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates.SaveTemplates(System.String)
member.summary: Save template definition to a XML file

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates.DefaultTemplates
member.summary: Define the default templates that can be used as start for your own templates

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.HTMLTemplates.LoadTemplates(System.String)
member.summary: Loading the templates from a XML file with definitions

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper
member.summary: Class for all kinds of helper routines, it is the base for all the other routines and classes in the library When possible shared functions are used so this functions like a function library

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.PackageTree2String(EA.Package)
member.summary: Recursively build a list of package ids from the package tree under a rootpackage
member.param: Rootpackage for constructing a list of package ids
member.returns: List of packageids in een comma separated text string

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.SelectedGridRows2DataTable(System.Windows.Forms.DataGridView)
member.summary: Transform a list of selected rows in a datagrid to a datatable
member.returns: Datatable with only selected items as rows

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.GetRepository
member.summary: Get an instance of the repository the IDEA addon is currently connected to

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.InitCap(System.String)
member.summary: Transform a name to a name with an initial capital character

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.SetProgressBarInit(System.Windows.Forms.ProgressBar,System.Int32)
member.summary: Initialize the progressbar with a min and max value

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.Text2ClipBoard(System.String)
member.summary: Insert a text to the windows clipboard

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.SQL2Log(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write a SQL statement to the logfile

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.Error2Log(System.Exception)
member.summary: Write an error message to the error log

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.DebugAssertion(System.String)
member.summary: Make a popup of a specific message

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.SQL2DataTable(System.String,EA.Repository)
member.summary: Transform a selectstatement to a datatable object
member.param: Repository is neccessary for executing the command to an EA repository

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.Error2Log(System.String)
member.summary: Error message to the error logfile
member.param: The message to add to the log file

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.DefaultTaggedValues(EA.Element,EA.Repository)
member.summary: Create a list of tagged values for the element based on the tagged value defined in the repository This makes it possible to create the tagged values based on this routine It makes use of a config setting that you can define to limit the tagged values created

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.ExportDiagram(System.Int32,System.Boolean,System.Boolean,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Export a diagram to a file based on the definition in the idea settings artifact
member.param: Diagram id for opening and closing the diagram
Check if the diagram is already open
Check if the file is recently modified to prevent an extra write
Batch export to open a diagram, check for existance and close the diagram after the batch export

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.Diagrams2WPP(EA.Package)
member.summary: Export a diagram in Sparx to a png file so it can be retrieved via WPP
member.param: Package from which the diagrams are exported

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.LinkedDocument2WPP(EA.Package)
member.summary: Export a diagram in Sparx to a png file so it can be retrieved via WPP
member.param: Package from which the diagrams are exported

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.DefaultTaggedValues(EA.Attribute,EA.Repository)
member.summary: Create a list of tagged values for the attribute based on the tagged value defined in the repository This makes it possible to create the tagged values based on this routine It makes use of a config setting that you can define to limit the tagged values created

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.DefaultTaggedValues(EA.Connector,EA.Repository)
member.summary: Create a list of tagged values for the attribute based on the tagged value defined in the repository This makes it possible to create the tagged values based on this routine It makes use of a config setting that you can define to limit the tagged values created

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.String2File(System.String,System.String,System.IO.FileMode)
member.summary: Write a string to a textfile

member.summary: Transform a datatable to a CSV text

member.summary: Execute a modify statement (insert update delete etc)

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.IsUserGroupMember(EA.Repository,System.String)
member.summary: Is current login user member of a security group

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.SQL2DataSet(System.String,EA.Repository)
member.summary: Transform a statement to a dataset Preferably use the sql2datatable command

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.SQLForEAP(System.String,EA.Repository)
member.summary: Transform a statement and make it relevant for an eap file (is an access sql statement)

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.EAString2DataSet(System.String)
member.summary: Transform a Sparx dataset string to a usable dataset in VB

member.summary: Transform an sql resultset string to a datatable
member.param: XML string resultset from the sql statement transformed to a datatable

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.DLA2EAHelper.ReadCsvFile(System.String)
member.summary: Read a csv file and transform it to a datatable

member.name: T:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.WasteBin
member.summary: Class for handling wastebin routines when a user deletes an item from the repository

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.WasteBin.WasteBinElement(EA.Repository,System.String)
member.summary: Copy an element to the wastebin before we delete it from the repository

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.WasteBin.DeleteFromWasteBin(EA.Repository)
member.summary: Can the user delete an element from the wastebin when the user is authorized

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.WasteBin.WasteBinPackage(EA.Repository,System.String)
member.summary: Delete a package but copy a clone before the delete to the wastebin package

member.name: M:IDEA.DLAFormfactory.WasteBin.GetWasteBinPackage_id
member.summary: retrieve the package id from the settings when the id is -999 the wastebin package is not defined

member.name: T:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable
member.summary: Class for normalizing a datatable imported from an excel sheet

member.name: P:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.DataTable
member.summary: connection to the datatable

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.#ctor
member.summary: Create a result datatable for doing a proposal for normalization and lookup definitions

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.AddResult(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Add a row to the result datatable with a suggestion for a normalization/enumeration

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.CheckExist(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Check weather a list of fieldnames exists in the normalization definities

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.EvaluateDataTable(System.Windows.Forms.ProgressBar)
member.summary: Process the fieldnames for enumarations and various fieldcombinations for normalization

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.EvaluateCombination(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String},System.Int32)
member.summary: Evaluate if a combination of fields is a normalization combination

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.FieldsToString(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Transform a list of fieldnames to a comma separated text string

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.EvaluateEnumeration(System.Collections.Generic.List{System.String})
member.summary: Evaluate if a field is an enumeration

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.CreateEnumerations
member.summary: Create an enumeration in the repository based on the generated result set of the normalizer

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.CreateFieldCombinations
member.summary: Create a normalized table in the repository based on the normalization results

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.CreateRootElement(System.String)
member.summary: Create a root class element (mostly based on the excel sheet name in the normalizer

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.CreateRootAttributes
member.summary: Create the attributes in the root element (the startup object element for the normalizer)

member.name: M:IDEA.DLANormalizeDataTable.GetRepositoryConnector
member.summary: Get a connection to the active repository for further processing of the normalizer

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchiMaid3.LoadImageList
member.summary: Load the imagelist of the archimate symbols with a trick from the resources of the addon

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchiMaid3.LoadListView
member.summary: Load the listview of selected archimate element stereotypes for the search window

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchiMaid3.DoSearch
member.summary: Construct the sql statement for the search based on the various controls and selected values in the aid screen

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchiMaid3.ToolStripButtonAddDiagram_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Add the selected elements in the grid to the currently active diagram

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.FrmArchitectureWizard_Load(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Load the wizard form an set the relevant comboboxes etc with data from the select statements

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.ProcessButtonNext(System.String)
member.summary: Handle the activities for the tabpage selected Loading the next tabages and creating a package etc

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.ProcessWizard
member.summary: Process the selected options in the wizard. Called via the Finish button at the end of the wizard

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.CreateConnector(EA.Element,EA.Element,System.String)
member.summary: Create a connector between two elements including the relevant stereotype You have to handle the direction yourself by selecting the source and targetg

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.DeleteUnusedPatterns(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Routine to delete the unused patterns from the newly created diagrams in the project package

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.CreateDiagramObject(EA.Element,EA.Diagram,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create a diagram object for the source and the target elements on the diagram if they do not yet exist

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.ButtonNext_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handle the click event for the next button in the wizard

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.HandleButtons(System.Boolean)
member.summary: Take care of the previous and next button for the wizard

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.SearchReplace
member.summary: Search and replace parts of the text in a package. Works both for elements and diagrams currently not for connectors

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.ButtonPrevious_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Process the activities after the previous button is pressed

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.ButtonFinish_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Process clicking the finish button

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.LoadPrecedingGrid
member.summary: Load the grid with the elements of the preceding modules available in the repository

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.CheckBoxIncludeWerkmap_CheckedChanged(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Handling of the include werkmap function to load the grid with extra elements

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmArchitectureWizard.LoadTemplatesCombo
member.summary: loading of the combobox with with templates of processing steps based on the sample diagrams

member.name: T:IDEA.FrmElementDeduplicator
member.summary: Deduplication of an element with a number of subscreens in the tabpage to display the differences. This is the screen generated by Visual Studio

member.name: T:IDEA.DeduplCompareItem
member.summary: Class for comparing the elements in the deduplicator routine, it has two types of compare properties, one for the name and one for the total of an element.

member.name: F:IDEA.DeduplCompareItem.Total
member.summary: Property for comparing the total of two elements of the same EA type.

member.name: F:IDEA.DeduplCompareItem.Name
member.summary: Name element for doing the compare. The difference between total and name is an update or an insert in the deduplicator screen.

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmIdeaDiagram.ButtonMatchNames_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Routine for matching attributes based on the name

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmImportExcel.AddCodelijst(System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Voeg een codelijst item toe zodat die gebruikt kunnen worden in de grids om het werk van de beheerder iets makkelijker te maken

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmSettings.FrmSettings_Load(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Load various elements in the settings window, especially the two grids with settings data for the IDEA addon

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmSettings.LoadUserSettings
member.summary: Load all user settings from the user config setttings to the form controls

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmSettings.SaveUserSettings
member.summary: Save the defied settings in the form controls to the user settings in the appdat section of the computer

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmSettings.FrmSettings_Closing(System.Object,System.ComponentModel.CancelEventArgs)
member.summary: Save the settings in this screen to various sections for example the user settings to the app data For the system settings there are two options one is to an artifact in the database named IDEAconfig and the second is to the user data

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmUniqueElement.SetElement(EA.Element,EA.Repository)
member.summary: Set the element and do a check if the element is unique

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmUniqueElement.ColorDiagramObject(System.Int32)
member.summary: Color a duplicate element background to read to give a warning color

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmUniqueElement.ButtonDeduplicate_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Execute a deduplication action in the current diagram

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmUniqueElement.ButtonFindOriginal_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Find the original element in the browser

member.name: M:IDEA.FrmUniqueElement.ButtonFindDuplicate_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Find the duplicate element in the browser

member.name: T:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn
member.summary: Connector class for the menu options etcetera for the AddOn the functions are called from the EA application Here all the connection points from the EA application are defined

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_OnPreDeleteElement(EA.Repository,EA.EventProperties)
member.summary: When an element is deleted first check for the wastebin function in IDEA

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_OnPreDeletePackage(EA.Repository,EA.EventProperties)
member.summary: When a package is deleted first check for the wastebin function in IDEA

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_OnPostNewConnector(EA.Repository,EA.EventProperties)
member.summary: Give a message when someone creates a connector to a deleted or obsolete element Specific for the NS

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_OnPostOpenDiagram(EA.Repository,System.Int32)
member.summary: Check for the diagram helpers to see if they need to be opened See ArchimAid and DatAid

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_OnPostCloseDiagram(EA.Repository,System.Int32)
member.summary: Save the diagram direct to a file

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.IsProjectOpen(EA.Repository)
member.summary: true if a project is opened in EA Based on this the menu is shown

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_GetMenuState(EA.Repository,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean@,System.Boolean@)
member.summary: check of the IDEA menu needs to be enabled (when a project is opened) or not

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.OpenFormForElement(EA.Repository,EA.Element)
member.summary: Activate the specific helper window based on the stereotype of the active element

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_GetMenuItems(EA.Repository,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create the menu's for the IDEA AddOn menu, the explorer and the diagram canvas the array of options is dynamically created based on the user settings

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_MenuClick(EA.Repository,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Handle the click of a menu item and call the relevant underlying routine

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEA.IDEAAddIn.EA_OnNotifyContextItemModified(EA.Repository,System.String,EA.ObjectType)
member.summary: Call the deduplicator check screen when this is activated

member.name: T:IDEA.IDEADataTypes
member.summary: Class for a list of datatypes for the conversion from one layer in the other in the data model (LDM - TDM)

member.name: F:IDEA.IDEADataTypes.VBNet
member.summary: Class for doing transformations of the datatypes for the IDEA routines to go from one datamodeling layer to the other.

member.name: T:IDEA.IDEAGenerator
member.summary: Generating elements from one layer to the other (CDM - LDM - FDM) These are complex transformations tha tcan be modified when relevant. Important is to consider that these routines are based on the IDEA screens. In the scripts in the sample repository there are differences in implementation.

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CreateConnector(EA.Element,EA.Element,System.String)
member.summary: create a connector in the EA repository

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CopyClass2UI(EA.Element,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a sample UI of a Class element

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.RefactorAssociation(EA.Element,EA.Element,System.String)
member.summary: Refactor an asssociation and move it together with an attribute to a new class

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CopyAttribute(EA.Element,EA.Element,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copy an attribute from one class to antother

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CopyAttribute(EA.Element,EA.Element,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Copy an attribute from one class to antother

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CreatePrimaryKey(EA.Element,EA.Attribute)
member.summary: Create a primary key column for the transformation to the database structure

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CreateConnectorForAttribute(EA.Attribute,EA.Attribute,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String,EA.LinkLineStyle)
member.summary: Create a connector (mapping for an attribute)

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.Attribute2Column(EA.Attribute,EA.Attribute,EA.Element,EA.Element)
member.summary: Routine for creating columns in a PDM from a class attribute in a LDM

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CreateElement(System.String,System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Create an element in the repository based on the name and the type
member.param: Package id where to add the newly created element

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CreateTraceAssociation(EA.Element,EA.Element)
member.summary: Create a trace association between two elements in different XDM layers

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.CopyAssociation(EA.Connector,EA.Element,EA.Element,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Copy an association

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEAGenerator.RefactorAttribute(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Move an attribute from one element to the other for refactoring

member.name: T:IDEA.IDEADefinitions
member.summary: Class for processing definitions, such as connections, queries, etc. Is done based on a Dataset that is stored via XML in the config file

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.CheckVersion
member.summary: Check for version number when the version nummber in the settings is higher you can not use the AddOn

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.LoadTableDefinitions
member.summary: Loading the metamodel of the definitions in the form of a dataset with datatables

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.SaveSettings
member.summary: Save the definitions to the users setting or to an artifact (IDEAConfig) in the current repository

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.SaveTranslations
member.summary: Save the translations datatable to either a setting or to a tagged value of the ideaconfig artifact

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.SaveDataAnalyser
member.summary: Sava dataanalyzer definition to the IDEA datadefinitions

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.LoadFromSettings(EA.Repository)
member.summary: Load from settings this can be an IDEASettings artifact in the repository or via the user settings

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.LoadDataSetXML(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Loading the dataset with definitions from the configuration file f from the fill of the result tab. If no material is found, a few sample items will be made
member.param: Dataset definities uit de config file
Dataset afkomstig vanuit het result scherm

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.GetFilteredTable(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Search in a dataset collection for a filter, activate it and return the filtered subset
member.param: Name of the datatable to retrieve data from

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.GetSettingValue(System.String)
member.summary: utility routine to get the value of a configitem based on its name If the name is not found, an empty string is returned

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.GetTable(System.String)
member.summary: Retrieve datatable based on the configuration datatable name

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.AddInitialSetting(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create the initial settings for the IDEA AddOn so later the user can modify it via the settings window

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.AddInitialSQL(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create an initial SQL statement for the diagram helper screen

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.AddInitialArchiMaid(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add initial values of the datatable with archimate elements for the new archimaid helper

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.FormControls2TransLations(System.String,System.Windows.Forms.Control.ControlCollection,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Create a translations table based on the controls in a form. Please note the recursive approach

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.Translations2FormControls(System.String,System.Windows.Forms.Control.ControlCollection,System.Boolean)
member.summary: Read the translations datatable and transfer it to the control labels in the form based on the name. Please note the recursive approach

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.AddTransLation(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a translation for a form and control to the datatable of translations

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.AddSetting(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add a setting to the table settings

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.AddStatement(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add an item to the datatable with statements

member.name: M:IDEA.IDEADefinitions.AddArchiMaid(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Add an archimate element to the datatable for the archimaid

member.name: T:IDEA.ReleaseContainer
member.summary: Container class for storing release manager steps for transferring XML specifications from one environment to the other.

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseContainer.AddReleaseItem(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Boolean,System.String)
member.summary: Add a release item to the release table

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseContainer.ClearContainer
member.summary: delete all the release table items

member.name: T:IDEA.ReleaseManager
member.summary: Bring the data of a release from one environment to the other in a DTAP implementation

member.name: P:IDEA.ReleaseManager.Repository
member.summary: Reference to the repository class of the running EA instance

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseManager.MakePackageBaseline
member.summary: Create baseline for the packages defined in the releasetable

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseManager.AddMessage(System.String)
member.summary: Write a message to the session output screen for the release manager activities

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseManager.RestorePackageBaseline
member.summary: Restore the packages from a baseline based on the table of release items

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseManager.ExportPackageXMI
member.summary: Export the package content to an xmi export file with the guid of the package

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseManager.ImportPackageXMI
member.summary: Import the content of a package from an XMI file

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseManager.Elements2Team
member.summary: Bring the elements together in a package of the team

member.name: M:IDEA.ReleaseManager.Elements2OriginalPackage
member.summary: Return the elements in a package from the package to the original location

member.name: T:IDEA.HTMLPublicator
member.summary: Class for the HTML generator. Various functions to generate HTML pages and snippets from the elements in the repository

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.CheckAndAddItem(System.Data.DataRow,System.String)
member.summary: Check if a diagram is already processed by the publisher and if not add it to the list of ready to process diagrams

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.CheckAndRemoveDiagram(System.String)
member.summary: Check if a diagram is processed and if so remove it from the list of to be processed diagrams

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.CheckAndRemovePackage(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a package from the list of packages based on the id

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.CheckAndRemoveElement(System.String)
member.summary: Remove a package from the list of elements based on the id

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.ReadHTMLTemplate(System.String)
member.summary: Read the template from a template file on the disk

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.MaakURL(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a html href tag from the filename and the title

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.Export2HTML(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Write the processed string to a file and do some processing for the tags

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.FullFileName(System.String)
member.summary: Make a full file name of the html file including the path and the extension

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.PubliceerRootPackage(EA.Package)
member.summary: Publish the package content to Html pages

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.PubliceerSubPackages
member.summary: Publish the subpackages of a package

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.PubliceerHTMLPagina
member.summary: Process all the elements etc based on the collection of html templates

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.PubliceerDiagrams
member.summary: Publish all the diagrams based on an array of found diagrams

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.PubliceerElements
member.summary: Publish all the elements found based on an array of found elements

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.SaveDiagramImage(System.String,System.Int32)
member.summary: Write the diagram to disk as a png file on a standardized location

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.MaakSiteMapURL(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Create a sitemap url for a package or diagram. With diagram you can define a tree like structure

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.ProcessSQL2Template(System.String@,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String,System.String)
member.summary: Process sql statement for various templates for an element

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.PubliceerPackage(EA.Package)
member.summary: Publish a package to html
member.param: Object of the package to process

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.PublishSiteMap
member.summary: Write the constructed sitemap to a file

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.Element2Map(EA.Element,EA.DiagramObject,System.Double,System.Double,System.Double)
member.summary: Convert an element and a diagramobject in a diagram to a map tag in a html construction. In here a number of calculations and transformations are needed
member.param: Data object to process (read the coordinates)
Min X position of alle the elements
Min Y position of alle the elements
Max X position of alle the elements when resizing is needed

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.MakeDiagramMap(EA.Diagram)
member.summary: Publish a diagram and all the elements to a html page

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.DeleteFilesInFolder
member.summary: delete all the files available in the publication folder

member.name: M:IDEA.HTMLPublicator.Generate(EA.Package)
member.summary: Generate the documentation based on the first package

member.name: T:IDEA.SimulatorContainer
member.summary: Class added for inheritance and encapsulation of the routines

member.name: M:IDEA.WndWelcome.ButtonReleaseManager_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Open the releasemanager window

member.name: M:IDEA.WndWelcome.ButtonImportNorm_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Import screen for importing and normalizing data from an excel file

member.name: M:IDEA.WndWelcome.ButtonSettings_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Open the settings window of the IDEA AddOn

member.name: M:IDEA.WndWelcome.ButtonDiagram2WPP_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Export all the diagrams to a file in a directory. There is an extra check for if the file does already exist before writing it to a file. This is necessary for a gpf message from internal sparx

member.name: M:IDEA.WndWelcome.ButtonOrphan_Click(System.Object,System.EventArgs)
member.summary: Open the window for displaying the orphans window for diagram and relation orphans
